TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_wawana, title = wawana, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/wawana} }

S.FORM: == wawana == u zuma a kamu: u Hulam :女孩,女兒 u Amilika :girl u Lipun :少女
S.PHON: == wawana == u zuma a kamu: u ħur~ɾam :**,** u amir~ɾika :girr~ɾ u r~ɾipun :**
